threats.title: Command injection via child process execution
threats.vector: Crafted program name with shell metacharacters or path separators
threats.control: Process::validate_program rejects 17 metacharacters plus path separators and null byte

threats.title: Path traversal via ValidatedRoot
threats.actor: Malicious Local User, Template Attacker, Plugin Author
threats.vector: Relative path with ../, absolute path, symlink escape
threats.control: Canonical path comparison, symlink resolution, per-component validation

threats.title: Template engine abuse (include/extends traversal, recursion)
threats.vector: Crafted {% include %} with ../ or absolute path, deep recursion
threats.control: Rejects .. : and absolute paths. Recursion bound at 16 levels.

threats.title: Secrets leaked in logs, error messages, or MCP responses
threats.vector: Trigger error that includes file content with secrets
threats.target: All error handling, logging, MCP response formatting
threats.control: AGENTS.md policy mandates redaction before all output

threats.title: Malicious plugin or git hook execution
threats.vector: Install plugin from untrusted source, install malicious git hook
threats.control: Plugin install receipts track source/permissions. Process validates command names.

threats.title: Injection via MCP JSON-RPC input
threats.vector: Crafted tool call with malicious arguments, oversized payload
threats.control: 1 MB max message size. All tools reuse lode-core security controls.

threats.title: Secret data leaked via LSP diagnostics
threats.vector: textDocument/publishDiagnostics sends secret findings to editor
threats.control: STDIO transport only. Secrets scanner has .env allowlist.

threats.title: Compromised upstream dependency
threats.control: cargo audit in CI. cargo deny for licenses/bans/sources.

threats.title: Unauthorized IPC commands to daemon
threats.vector: Connect to daemon IPC socket and send crafted commands
threats.control: Unix socket file permissions. TCP bound to 127.0.0.1. Limited command set.

threats.title: Symlink race during atomic write
threats.vector: Symlink created at temp path before atomic rename
threats.control: Temp file created in same directory as target. Atomic rename on same filesystem.
